roster.title: Your Characters
roster.hint: Create, manage, and play your D&D characters.
roster.atCharCap: Character limit reached ({{max}}). Delete one to add another.
roster.importPreviewBlocked: Importing isn't available in the local preview
roster.examplePreviewBlocked: Loading the example isn't available in the local preview
roster.errorBlurb: Something went wrong reaching your folio. Check your connection. Your characters are safe and will reappear once you're back online.
roster.emptyBlurb: No characters yet. Forge your first adventurer: the guided path walks you through every choice, no rulebook needed.
roster.emptyPath: The journey: {{steps}}. Every rule is computed for you.
roster.exportPortraitDropped: Exported {{name}}, but the portrait couldn't be included. Export again while online to embed it.
roster.clonePreviewBlocked: Cloning isn't available in the local preview
roster.deleteMessage: This permanently deletes {{name}} and everything it owns: its portrait, snapshots, and play state. This can't be undone.
roster.bulkDeleteMessage_one: This permanently deletes this character and everything it owns: its portrait, snapshots, and play state. This can't be undone.
roster.bulkDeleteMessage_other: This permanently deletes {{count}} characters and everything they own: their portraits, snapshots, and play state. This can't be undone.
roster.bulkExportPortraitsDropped_one: {{count}} portrait couldn't be included. Export again while online to embed it.
roster.bulkExportPortraitsDropped_other: {{count}} portraits couldn't be included. Export again while online to embed them.
roster.noMatchBlurb: No character matches “{{query}}”. Try a different name or class.
